---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(lattice)
library(gstat)
library(sp)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(plotly)
library(raster)
library(dismo)
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(terra)
library(RColorBrewer)
#netCDF packages
library(ncdf4)
library(CFtime)
library(stars)
library(here)
```

##Locations 
```{r}
data_loc <- here("Data")
pca_loc <- here("Data", "PCA")
outputs_loc <- here("Outputs")
averages_loc <- here("Outputs", "AvgRasters")
```


##Plotting density curves with TRENDY data
```{r}
bnf <- read.csv(here(data_loc,'BNF_TRENDYN.csv'), header= TRUE)
bnf_no_NA <- bnf %>% drop_na(Variance)

denit <- read.csv(here(data_loc,'Nloss_TRENDYN.csv'), header= TRUE)
denit_no_NA <- denit %>% drop_na(Variance)
```


#BNF Density curves - CV
```{r}
#model_bnf <- raster(x = "CV_TRENDYN_BNF.tif")
cv_bnf <- brick(here(outputs_loc,"Tropics_BNF_CV.tif"))
cv_bnf_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(cv_bnf,spatial = TRUE))
```

```{r}
#model_bnf <- raster(x = "CV_TRENDYN_BNF.tif")
cv_bnf_global <- brick(here(averages_loc, "BNF_CV.tif"))
cv_bnf_global_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(cv_bnf_global,spatial = TRUE))
```

```{r}
# Assuming df1, df2, and df3 are your dataframes with the respective columns

# Install and load necessary libraries if not already installed
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# library(ggplot2)

# Set your desired x-axis extent
x_axis_extent <- c(0,3)

# Specify the colors for each dataset
color_palette <- c("BNF - Tropics" = "grey", "BNF - Sampled points" = "red")

# Create density plots using ggplot2 with specified x-axis extent, colors, and legend
p <-ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = cv_bnf_df, aes(x = lyr.1, fill = "BNF - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = bnf_no_NA, aes(x = CV, fill = "BNF - Sampled points"), alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = " ", x = "Coefficient of Variation", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +  # Set legend name and colors
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.86), # Adjust legend position
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16), # Adjust font size for axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)   # Adjust font size for axis text
  )
p
ggsave("CV_BNF_Clean.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```




#Denit Density curves - CV
```{r}
#model_bnf <- raster(x = "CV_TRENDYN_BNF.tif")
cv_denit <- brick(here(outputs_loc,"Tropics_Nloss_CV.tif"))
cv_denit_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(cv_denit,spatial = TRUE))
```

```{r}
#model_bnf <- raster(x = "CV_TRENDYN_BNF.tif")
cv_denit_global <- brick(here(averages_loc,"Nloss_CV.tif"))
cv_denit_global_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(cv_denit_global,spatial = TRUE))
```

```{r}
# Assuming df1, df2, and df3 are your dataframes with the respective columns

# Install and load necessary libraries if not already installed
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# library(ggplot2)

# Set your desired x-axis extent
x_axis_extent <- c(0,3)

# Specify the colors for each dataset
color_palette <- c("N loss - Tropics" = "grey", "Denit - Sampled points" = "blue")

# Create density plots using ggplot2 with specified x-axis extent, colors, and legend
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = cv_denit_global_df, aes(x = lyr.1, fill = "N loss - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = denit_no_NA, aes(x = CV, fill = "Denit - Sampled points"), alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = " ", x = "Coefficient of Variation", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +  # Set legend name and colors
   theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.86), # Adjust legend position
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16), # Adjust font size for axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)   # Adjust font size for axis text
  )
p
ggsave("CV_NLoss_Clean.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```



##BNF TRENDY Mean
```{r}
#model_bnf <- raster(x = "CV_TRENDYN_BNF.tif")
mean_bnf <- brick(here(outputs_loc,"Tropics_BNF_Mean.tif"))
mean_bnf_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(mean_bnf,spatial = TRUE))
```

```{r}
x_axis_extent <- c(0,7.5)

# Specify the colors for each dataset
color_palette <- c("BNF - Tropics" = "grey", "BNF - Sampled points" = "red")

# Create density plots using ggplot2 with specified x-axis extent, colors, and legend
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = mean_bnf_df, aes(x = lyr.1, fill = "BNF - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = bnf_no_NA, aes(x = Mean, fill = "BNF - Sampled points"), alpha = 0.5) +
  labs( x = "Mean all models", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +  # Set legend name and colors
   theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.86), # Adjust legend position
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16), # Adjust font size for axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)   # Adjust font size for axis text
  )
p
ggsave("Mean_BNF_Clean.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```


##N loss TRENDY Mean

```{r}
#model_bnf <- raster(x = "CV_TRENDYN_BNF.tif")
mean_nloss <- brick(here(outputs_loc,"Tropics_Nloss_Mean.tif"))
mean_nloss_df <- as.data.frame(rasterToPoints(mean_nloss,spatial = TRUE))
```

```{r}
x_axis_extent <- c(0,7.5)

# Specify the colors for each dataset
color_palette <- c("N loss - Tropics" = "grey", "N loss - Sampled points" = "blue")

# Create density plots using ggplot2 with specified x-axis extent, colors, and legend
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = mean_nloss_df, aes(x = lyr.1, fill = "N loss - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = denit_no_NA, aes(x = Mean, fill = "N loss - Sampled points"), alpha = 0.5) +
  labs( x = "Mean all models", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +  # Set legend name and colors
   theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.86), # Adjust legend position
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16), # Adjust font size for axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)   # Adjust font size for axis text
  )
p
ggsave("Mean_NLoss_Clean.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

##Flux towers
```{r}
flux <- read.csv(here(data_loc,'FluxTowers_ModelCV.csv'), header= TRUE)
flux_no_NA <- flux %>% drop_na(BNF_CV1)
```

```{r}
x_axis_extent <- c(0,3)

# Specify the colors for each dataset
color_palette <- c("BNF - Tropics" = "grey", "BNF - Flux towers" = "red")

# Create density plots using ggplot2 with specified x-axis extent, colors, and legend
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = cv_bnf_df, aes(x = lyr.1, fill = "BNF - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = flux_no_NA, aes(x = BNF_CV1, fill = "BNF - Flux towers"), alpha = 0.5) +
  labs( x = "Coefficient of Variation", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +  # Set legend name and colors
   theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.86), # Adjust legend position
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16), # Adjust font size for axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)   # Adjust font size for axis text
  )
p
ggsave("CV_FluxTower_BNF_Clean.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
# Set your desired x-axis extent
x_axis_extent <- c(0,3)

# Specify the colors for each dataset
color_palette <- c("N loss - Tropics" = "grey", "N loss - Flux towers" = "blue")

# Create density plots using ggplot2 with specified x-axis extent, colors, and legend
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = cv_denit_df, aes(x = lyr.1, fill = "N loss - Tropics"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = flux_no_NA, aes(x = Nloss_CV1, fill = "N loss - Flux towers"), alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient of Variation", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlim(x_axis_extent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette, name = " ") +  # Set legend name and colors
   theme(
    legend.position = c(0.83, 0.86), # Adjust legend position
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16), # Adjust font size for axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)   # Adjust font size for axis text
  )
p
ggsave("CV_FluxTower_NLoss_Clean.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```


##Bar chart 

```{r}
#igbp_fine_sample <- read.csv(file = "IGBP_Fine_SamplingDensity.csv", header = TRUE)
igbp_rough_sample <- read.csv(here(data_loc, 'IGBP_rough_SamplingDensity.csv'), header = TRUE)
```



```{r}
colors <- c("grey", "red", "blue")  # Replace with your desired colors

# Define the order of categorical variables
custom_order <- c("ENF", "EBF", "DNF", "DBF", "Mixed Forests", "Savannas", "Grassland", "Permanent Wetlands", "Barren")  # Replace with your desired order
igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_BNF_sites
# Create a grouped bar plot using specific columns as y-values
p <- plot_ly(igbp_rough_sample, x = ~Biome_rough, type = NULL, marker = list(opacity = 0.7)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~SampleRate_BNF_measurements, name = "BNF", type = "bar", marker = list(color = colors[2])) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~SampleRate_denit_measurements, name = "Denitrification", type = "bar", marker = list(color = colors[3])) %>%
  layout(title = "IGBP Coarse-Scale Land Cover Difference",
         xaxis = list(title = "Biome", categoryorder = "array", categoryarray = custom_order),
         yaxis = list(title = "Percent difference (%)"),
         barmode = "group",
         legend = list(x = 0.9, y = 0.9))

# Print the updated plot
p
```

```{r}
label_mapping <- c("EBF" = "Evergreen Broadleaf Forest",
                   "DBF" = "Deciduous Broadleaf Forest",
                   "Mixed Forests" = "Mixed Forests",
                   "Savannas" = "Savannas",
                   "Grassland" = "Grassland",
                   "Permanent Wetlands" = "Permanent Wetlands",
                   "Barren" = "Barren")
igbp_rough_sample$CustomLabels <- label_mapping[igbp_rough_sample$Biome_rough]

p <- plot_ly(igbp_rough_sample, x = ~CustomLabels, type = NULL, marker = list(opacity = 0.7)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~SampleRate_BNF_sites, name = "BNF", type = "bar", marker = list(color = colors[2])) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~SampleRate_denit_sites, name = "Denitrification", type = "bar", marker = list(color = colors[3])) %>%
  layout(title = " ",
         xaxis = list(title = " ", categoryorder = "array", categoryarray = unique(igbp_rough_sample$CustomLabels), tickangle = 30),
         yaxis = list(title = " "),
         barmode = "group",
         legend = list(x = 0.9, y = 0.9))
p


# Create annotations for percentage labels
annotations <- list()
for (i in 1:nrow(igbp_rough_sample)) {
  # Find the max absolute value for correct positioning
  max_val <- max(abs(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_BNF_sites[i]), abs(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_denit_sites[i]))
  
  # Dynamic offset (5% of max value)
  y_offset <- max_val * 0.05  

  # Determine which bar is taller (absolute value)
  if (abs(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_BNF_sites[i]) >= abs(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_denit_sites[i])) {
    y_pos <- igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_BNF_sites[i] + ifelse(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_BNF_sites[i] > 0, y_offset, -y_offset)
    y_anchor <- ifelse(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_BNF_sites[i] > 0, 'bottom', 'top')
  } else {
    y_pos <- igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_denit_sites[i] + ifelse(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_denit_sites[i] > 0, y_offset, -y_offset)
    y_anchor <- ifelse(igbp_rough_sample$SampleRate_denit_sites[i] > 0, 'bottom', 'top')
  }
  
  # Add annotation for each bar
  annotations <- c(annotations, list(
    list(
      x = igbp_rough_sample$CustomLabels[i],  # Correct x-axis mapping
      y = y_pos,
      text = paste0(igbp_rough_sample$Percent_rough_total[i], "%"),
      showarrow = FALSE,
      xanchor = 'center',
      yanchor = y_anchor
    )
  ))
}

# Add annotations to the plot
p <- layout(p, annotations = annotations)

# Print the updated plot
p


```
